name: New Zealand
description: New Zealand offers a safe, welcoming environment with world-class universities and a stunning natural landscape. Its practical approach to education and generous work rights attract students globally.

tuitionFees.postgraduate: Application fee is to be paid through credit card only (Visa, MasterCard).
tuitionFees.phd: NZD 6,500 per year (domestic rate) with NZ Excellence Scholarship

scholarships.name: • Universities - There are 8 Government-funded Universities providing undergraduate
scholarships.eligibility: and postgraduate degree programmes. • Institutes of Technology and Polytechnics (ITPs) - A popular option is to study at one

scholarships.name: Scholarships are offered by universities in a limited way and completely depend on the student’s profile
Popular Scholarships in New Zealand
scholarships.eligibility: Vice-Chancellor's Scholarships for International Students (University of Otago)

scholarships.name: Vice-Chancellor's Scholarships for International Students
scholarships.eligibility: (University of Otago) Upto NZD 10,000 towards tuition fee.

scholarships.name: Wellington International Excellence Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: NZD 20,000 over three years paid towards tuition fees. Victoria Tongarewa Scholarship

scholarships.name: Victoria Tongarewa Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: NZD 5,000 or 10,000 University of Waikato International Excellence Scholarship

scholarships.name: University of Waikato International Excellence Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Up to NZ$10,000 towards tuition fees University of Auckland India High Achievers Scholarship

requirements: Student visa application via Immigration New Zealand
visaRequirements.processingTime: are processed in New Zealand. The current average processing time is between four to eight weeks depending on the level of verification and assessment

workPermit.duringStudy: Up to 20 hours per week during term; full-time during scheduled breaks
workPermit.postStudy: 1–3 years Post-Study Work Visa (duration depends on level of qualification)

languageRequirements.notes: English language proficiency required for all programs

topUniversities.name: • Institutes of Technology and Polytechnics (ITPs) - A popular option is to study at one
However, ITPs and Private Institutes have multiple Intakes for different courses

faqs.question: Is it easy to get a student visa for New Zealand?
faqs.answer: With proper documentation and financial proof, obtaining a student visa for New Zealand is straightforward. MVR Consultants can guide you through the entire process.

faqs.question: What are the tuition fees in New Zealand?
faqs.answer: Tuition fees vary by university and program. Contact our counselors for program-specific fee structures.

faqs.question: Can I work while studying?
faqs.answer: Most countries allow international students to work part-time during term time. Specific hours and conditions depend on the country's immigration rules.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships available for Indian students?
faqs.answer: Yes, many universities and governments offer merit-based and need-based scholarships for international students. Ask our counselors for scholarship matching.
